skills.name: Dashboard Design
skills.description: Design analytics dashboards with Tableau, PowerBI, Looker, Metabase. Outputs metric definitions, visualizations, filters, and user flows.
skills.promptPreview: Design analytics dashboards with metric definitions, visualizations, filters, drill-downs, and user flows for stakeholders.

skills.name: Data Quality Checks
skills.description: Design data quality validation with Great Expectations, custom checks, and automated monitoring. Outputs validation rules, anomaly detection, and data lineage.
skills.promptPreview: Design data quality validation with Great Expectations, custom checks, anomaly detection, and automated monitoring for data pipelines.

skills.name: Data Warehouse Schema
skills.description: Design data warehouse schemas with star/snowflake patterns, dimensions, facts, and slowly changing dimensions. Outputs DDL and ETL integration.
skills.promptPreview: Design data warehouse schemas with star/snowflake patterns, dimensions, facts, SCDs, and ETL integration strategies.

skills.name: ETL Pipeline
skills.description: Design extract-transform-load pipelines for data warehousing. Outputs data sources, transformations, quality checks, scheduling, and monitoring.
skills.promptPreview: Design ETL pipelines with data extraction, transformation logic, quality checks, scheduling, error handling, and monitoring.

skills.name: SQL Optimization
skills.description: Optimize slow SQL queries with indexing, query rewriting, and execution plan analysis. Outputs before/after metrics and index strategies.
skills.promptPreview: Optimize SQL queries with indexing strategies, query rewriting, execution plan analysis, and before/after performance metrics.

skills.name: Streaming Pipeline
skills.description: Design real-time streaming pipelines with Kafka, Flink, Spark Streaming. Outputs producer/consumer patterns, windowing, state management, and exactly-once semantics.
skills.promptPreview: Design real-time streaming pipelines with Kafka, Flink including producer/consumer patterns, windowing, and exactly-once semantics.
